mapper.select: SELECT address_id AS addressId, user_id AS userId, receiver_name AS receiverName, receiver_phone AS receiverPhone, address AS address, detail_address AS detailAddress, default_yn AS defaultYn FROM user_addresses WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY default_yn DESC, address_id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE user_addresses SET default_yn = 'N', updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_addresses ( user_id, receiver_name, receiver_phone, address, detail_address, default_yn, created_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{receiverName}, #{receiverPhone}, #{address}, #{detailAddress}, #{defaultYn}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE user_addresses SET receiver_name = #{receiverName}, receiver_phone = #{receiverPhone}, address = #{address}, detail_address = #{detailAddress}, default_yn = #{defaultYn}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE address_id = #{addressId} AND user_id = #{userId}
